name: career-copilot
description: Career Copilot eval cases for structured reports, repository evidence, resume guidance, hallucination controls, and interview preparation.

cases.name: career-analyze-fixed-inputs
cases.prompt: Read examples/career/real-world-anonymized/jd-marketing-growth.md, examples/career/real-world-anonymized/resume-marketing-anonymized.md, examples/career/real-world-anonymized/target.md, README.md, docs/demo.md, and examples/career/expected-report-outline.md. Also use file_search once for the query trace. After evidence review, call final_answer with a valid career_report JSON object containing keys summary, jd_analysis, project_evidence, resume_rewrite, interview_brief, gap_plan, risk_flags, and appendix. Include at least three project evidence claims, three resume bullets, and one risk flag. Do not claim revenue, ROI, conversion lift, paid budget, or brand growth unless a file proves it.

cases.name: anonymized-real-world-demo
cases.prompt: Read examples/career/real-world-anonymized/jd-marketing-growth.md, examples/career/real-world-anonymized/resume-marketing-anonymized.md, examples/career/real-world-anonymized/target.md, README.md, docs/demo.md, internal/career/report.go, and internal/career/command.go. Use search_docs for Career Copilot or report evidence. Then call final_answer with valid career_report JSON only. Focus on marketing role fit, campaign planning, content strategy, growth metrics, AI-assisted marketing productivity, and evidence boundaries.

cases.name: resume-bullet-rewrite-grounded
cases.prompt: Read examples/career/real-world-anonymized/resume-marketing-anonymized.md, examples/career/real-world-anonymized/jd-marketing-growth.md, examples/career/real-world-anonymized/target.md, README.md, and docs/demo.md. Rewrite marketing resume bullets for Marketing Manager and Growth Marketing roles. Call final_answer with valid career_report JSON only. The resume_rewrite.bullets field must include at least four recommended bullets and each project_evidence item must cite reviewed paths.

cases.name: risk-flag-hallucination-guard
cases.prompt: Read examples/career/real-world-anonymized/resume-marketing-anonymized.md, examples/career/real-world-anonymized/jd-marketing-growth.md, README.md, internal/career/report.go, and eval/career_cases.json. Produce a career_report JSON that explicitly flags unsupported marketing claims. Do not claim large-scale revenue, ROI, conversion lift, paid-channel budget, or brand growth unless exact evidence exists. Include those boundaries in risk_flags and explain what evidence would be needed.

cases.name: trace-eval-reliability-story
cases.prompt: Read docs/eval.md, eval/smoke_cases.json, eval/profile_cases.json, eval/career_cases.json, internal/eval/eval.go, internal/engine/runner.go, internal/engine/types.go, and cmd/happyagent-eval/main.go. Then call final_answer with valid career_report JSON only. Focus the project_evidence and interview_brief on Trace/Eval reliability, metrics, error categories, required tools, and per-case traces.

cases.name: mcp-skill-ecosystem-story
cases.prompt: Read README.md, docs/demo.md, internal/mcp/manager.go, internal/mcp/tool_adapter.go, internal/mcp/resource_preview.go, internal/runtime/skill_session.go, internal/runtime/capability_session.go, internal/tools/list_capabilities_tool.go, and internal/tools/activate_skill_tool.go. Produce valid career_report JSON only. Focus on how Career Copilot can use MCP integration, Skill activation, and capability discovery to support traceable marketing material analysis.

cases.name: local-tool-safety-controls
cases.prompt: Read config.example.json, README.md, internal/tools/paths.go, internal/tools/shell_tool.go, internal/tools/file_write_tool.go, internal/tools/file_delete_tool.go, internal/policy/policy.go, and internal/runtime/runtime.go. Produce valid career_report JSON only. Focus on local execution safety, path boundaries, approval policy, shell allowlist, write/delete controls, and output validation.

cases.name: career-workspace-product-flow
cases.prompt: Read README.md, docs/demo.md, internal/career/workspace.go, internal/career/ingest.go, internal/career/classifier.go, internal/career/artifacts.go, internal/career/command.go, and docs/templates/career-report.md.tmpl. Produce valid career_report JSON only. Focus on the Career Copilot product workflow: material classification, local archive, active pointers, report rendering, and export commands.

cases.name: gap-plan-rag-memory-upgrade
cases.prompt: Read examples/career/real-world-anonymized/jd-marketing-growth.md, examples/career/real-world-anonymized/resume-marketing-anonymized.md, internal/rag/rag.go, internal/memory/memory.go, internal/tools/search_docs_tool.go, profiles/career-copilot/profile.json, and docs/architecture.md. Produce valid career_report JSON only. The gap_plan must prioritize quantified campaign outcomes, portfolio artifacts, and stronger evidence citations, while risk_flags must avoid overstating marketing impact.

cases.name: interview-brief-architecture-defense
cases.prompt: Read README.md, docs/architecture.md, docs/demo.md, internal/runtime/builder.go, internal/runtime/runtime.go, internal/engine/loop.go, internal/app/app.go, and internal/store/store.go. Produce valid career_report JSON only. The interview_brief must include a concise project pitch, architecture talk track, tradeoffs, and questions to expect.
